testcase.name: byzantineEquivocatingLeaderStillMakesProgress

testcase.name: clientRequiresDistinctSignedReplies
testcase.system-out: [Client 206] up on port 6206 [Client 206] got reply frm node 0 (view 7): ok-from-0 [Client 206] got reply frm node 0 (view 7): duplicate-from-0 [Client 206] got reply frm node 1 (view 7): ok-from-1 [Client 206] stopped

testcase.name: invalidVoteSignatureByzantineNodeDoesNotBreakConsensus
